description: Promotion gates for strategy experiments. A variant must pass ALL gates to be eligible for promotion.

min_trade_count.description: Minimum total trades across IS + OOS

profit_factor_floor.description: Variant profit factor must be at least this value

expectancy_improvement_min.description: Variant expectancy must improve over baseline by at least this dollar amount (can be 0 for 'do no harm')

max_drawdown_increase_limit.description: Variant max drawdown cannot worsen by more than this absolute amount (e.g. 0.03 = 3%)

win_rate_floor.description: Variant win rate must be at least this fraction

avg_r_floor.description: Variant avg R must be at least this value

oos_profit_factor_floor.description: Out-of-sample profit factor must be at least this value

paper_incubation_required.description: If true, variant must complete paper incubation before promotion

paper_min_trades.description: Minimum paper-trading trades before promotion is possible

is_oos_split.description: In-sample / out-of-sample split ratio for backtest evaluation

notes: Promotion is always recommendation-only. No automatic config changes.
